title: 宝塚記念の後に・暗影

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Following a magnificent display, the glory of the
Takarazuka Kinen goes to Silence Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The venue is awash with cheers for a performance
befitting her title of Otherworldly Front-Runner.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Seeing the excitement of the crowd, Air Groove is
struck painfully by the feeling she can't surpass
Silence Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her composure rattled, Air Groove puts on a
brave face to focus on the Sapporo Kinen ahead,
but nonetheless leaves the racecourse dejected.
